workload.prompt: Describe this image in a detailed, concrete caption. Cover the main subject, composition, colors, materials, lighting, background, camera viewpoint, and every clearly readable word. Do not use a preamble.

eager.caption: A man with dark, curly hair and a trimmed beard, wearing glasses, stands confidently in front of a gold Mercedes-AMG S63 sedan, his hands clasped at his waist as he adjusts his dark navy suit jacket. He wears a crisp white dress shirt with the top button undone, a dark belt, and polished black dress shoes. The car, positioned directly behind him, features a glossy metallic gold finish, aggressive AMG styling with a black grille, prominent air
